intro: Clowesia glaucoglossa, also known as the pale yellow Clowesia, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The health benefits of Clowesia glaucoglossa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
